summary: Post-spike decay pattern: half-life ~1.6 days, projected Feb 24 value ~1 without new stimulus. Current Feb 18 ~14.
content: Google Trends for "nancy guthrie breaking news" shows clear post-spike decay. Peak Feb 14=100, then 48→30→17→14 (Feb 15-18). Exponential fit gives half-life ~1.6 days, projecting ~1 by Feb 24. Resolution thresholds: INCREASES needs >17, DC needs 11-17, DECREASES needs <11. Case is ongoing high-profile kidnapping with 400+ investigators. DNA test setback on Feb 17-18. Major developments happen every 2-3 days but generate decreasing interest.
